experiment: T3 iter53 Parkinson@Home external zero-shot validation

dataset.name: Parkinson@Home IMU sensor data and video annotations for arm swing quantification in free-living gait
dataset.license: Repository states CC0/open access plus data-use conditions in LICENSE.txt
dataset.cohort: 25 PD with motor fluctuations and 25 controls; PD recorded OFF and ON medication
dataset.sensor: bilateral wrist accelerometer and gyroscope at 200 Hz
dataset.labels: OFF/ON MDS-UPDRS Part III subitems in patient_info.csv

fixed_battery.primary_external_rows: PD subjects with valid OFF Part III target and readable right-wrist prepared parquet
fixed_battery.primary_target: OFF MDS-UPDRS Part III valid-range total
fixed_battery.feature_schema: frame-invariant right-wrist acceleration-magnitude summaries from clean gait-without-other-arm-activity segments in Parkinson@Home; WearGait uses right-wrist acceleration magnitude across TUG, SelfPace, and HurriedPace

B_clinical_plus_wrist.reason: The public patient_info.csv exposed in the probe contains UPDRS subitems but no H&Y/disease-duration/sex/DBS covariates.

D_off_on_response_sensitivity.train: same WearGait model as Track A
D_off_on_response_sensitivity.test: Parkinson@Home paired OFF and ON features

hard_stops: patient_info.csv must expose all OFF_UPDRS_3_* subitems needed for valid-range T3.
At least 20 PD OFF subjects must remain after valid-target and feature-readability filtering.
Prepared parquet reading must work with pyarrow or fastparquet on the execution host.
External accelerometry scale must be classifiable as g or m/s^2 from magnitude distribution.
No Parkinson@Home labels enter WearGait-trained Tracks A/D.
